locator.quote: The forced-arbitrage plan made arbs *possible*. This plan makes them

text: Thesis: the forced-arbitrage plan made arbs possible; this plan makes them happen — agents almost never take arbs despite the machinery being in place.
Run 90fcb25f (2026-04-14): arb counts decay across episodes (ep1 6/124, ep2 0/18, ep3 3/16) then ~0 with P&L +£0.00 — the policy stops betting.

locator.quote: Three distinct problems are stacking on top of each other:

text: Design review found three distinct problems stacking on top of each other: value-function collapse, arbs invisible in obs, and no warm start for a sparse-reward skill.
